Source: Azure OpenAI API Reference
URL: https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/azure/ai-services/openai/reference
Fetched: 2026-03-22

# Azure OpenAI REST API Reference

Page last updated: 2026-03-21

## API Versions
- Control Plane GA: 2025-06-01
- Control Plane Preview: 2025-07-01-preview
- Data Plane Inference GA: v1
- Data Plane Inference Preview: v1 preview
- Data Plane Authoring Preview: v1 preview
- Legacy Data Plane Inference GA: 2024-10-21

Note: New preview inference API with monthly cadence updates.

## Key Endpoints (GA: 2024-10-21)
- Completions: POST /openai/deployments/{deployment-id}/completions
- Chat Completions: POST /openai/deployments/{deployment-id}/chat/completions
- Embeddings: POST /openai/deployments/{deployment-id}/embeddings
- Audio Transcriptions: POST /openai/deployments/{deployment-id}/audio/transcriptions
- Audio Translations: POST /openai/deployments/{deployment-id}/audio/translations
- Image Generation: POST /openai/deployments/{deployment-id}/images/generations

## Authentication
- API Key (Header: api-key)
- Microsoft Entra ID (Bearer token)

## Key Chat Completions Parameters
- messages (required), temperature, top_p, stream, stop
- max_tokens, max_completion_tokens (upper bound including reasoning tokens)
- presence_penalty, frequency_penalty, logit_bias, user
- data_sources (Azure OpenAI chat extensions)
- logprobs, top_logprobs (range 0-20)
- n, parallel_tool_calls (default: true)
- response_format: text, json_object, json_schema
- seed (deterministic sampling)
- tools, tool_choice
- function_call (deprecated — use tool_choice)
- functions (deprecated — use tools)

## Chat Extensions Data Sources
- Azure Search: simple, semantic, vector, vector_simple_hybrid, vector_semantic_hybrid
- Azure Cosmos DB: MongoDB vCore with vector support
- Authentication types: api_key, connection_string, system_assigned_managed_identity, user_assigned_managed_identity

## Content Filtering
- Severity levels: very_low, low, medium, high
- Categories: sexual, violence, hate, self_harm, profanity, jailbreak, protected_material_text, protected_material_code

## Embeddings Parameters
- input_type, encoding_format (float or base64), dimensions (text-embedding-3+ only)

## Deprecated Features
- function_call parameter (use tool_choice instead)
- functions parameter (use tools instead)

## Image Generation Parameters
- prompt (required), n, size (256x256 to 1792x1024), response_format, user, quality (standard/hd), style (vivid/natural)

## Audio Transcription Parameters
- file (required), prompt, response_format, temperature (0-1), language (ISO-639-1)

## Finish Reasons
- stop, length, content_filter, tool_calls, function_call
